entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: An important oil seed crop grown under rainfed conditions and exposed to abiotic stresses.

entities.name: RAINFED CONDITIONS
entities.description: Environmental conditions where crops rely on rainfall for moisture.

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESSES
entities.description: Non-living environmental factors such as drought and salinity that negatively impact plant growth.

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: A condition of deficient moisture that causes stress to plants.

entities.name: SALINITY
entities.description: The presence of high salt concentrations in the soil causing stress to plants.

entities.name: RD29::DREB1A
entities.description: A gene overexpressed in transgenic groundnut to enhance stress tolerance.

entities.name: SALINITY TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of groundnut to maintain productivity under saline conditions.

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The measure of agricultural productivity under stress conditions.

entities.name: TRANSPIRATION EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The efficiency of water use in relation to biomass production, denoted as TE.

entities.name: TRANSPIRATION RATE
entities.description: The rate at which water is lost from the plant through transpiration.

entities.name: VAPOR PRESSURE DEFICIT
entities.description: The difference between the amount of moisture in the air and how much moisture the air can hold when saturated.

entities.name: WATER USE EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The efficiency with which a plant utilizes water for growth and development.

entities.name: WATER REGIMES
entities.description: Different levels or patterns of water availability provided to the plant.

entities.name: STOMATAL CONDUCTANCE
entities.description: The rate of passage of carbon dioxide into or water vapor out of the leaf through stomata.

entities.name: ROOT GROWTH
entities.description: The development and expansion of the root system in response to stress.

entities.name: WATER UPTAKE
entities.description: The process of absorbing water from the soil through the roots.

entities.name: SODIUM ACCUMULATION
entities.description: The buildup of sodium ions within the plant tissues under salinity stress.

entities.name: SEED YIELD
entities.description: The final weight or quantity of seeds produced by the plant.

entities.name: SALT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The capacity of the plant to withstand high salt levels and maintain growth.

entities.name: PLANT WATER LOSS
entities.description: The total amount of water lost by the plant to the atmosphere.

entities.name: ABA CONTENT
entities.description: The concentration of abscisic acid, a hormone regulating stress responses.

entities.name: STOMATA REGULATION
entities.description: The physiological control of the opening and closing of stomata.
